name: Actor Feat

rulesText.description: Official Actor feat: +1 Charisma, advantage on Deception and Performance checks when impersonating, and the ability to mimic voices and sounds you have heard for at least 1 minute.

desc: Official Actor feat: +1 Charisma, advantage on Deception and Performance checks when impersonating, and the ability to mimic voices and sounds you have heard for at least 1 minute.
